Conventional Commits Enforcer

v2.1.0
Git

Pre-commit hook that validates commit messages against the Conventional Commits spec. Blocks non-compliant commits and suggests corrections with AI assistance.

Auto-Docs Generator

v1.4.2
Documentation

Automatically generates and updates JSDoc/TSDoc comments, README sections, and API reference pages whenever code changes are detected. Supports TypeScript, Python, Go.

8.7k1120
Free

Sentinel Security Scanner

v3.0.1
Security

Real-time security vulnerability scanner with SAST capabilities. Integrates with your agent to flag issues inline as you code. Covers OWASP Top 10 and CWE Top 25.

Deploy Notifier

v1.2.0
DevOps

Post-deploy webhook dispatcher. Sends rich notifications to Slack, Discord, PagerDuty, or custom endpoints with diff summaries, health check results, and rollback links.

Analytics
